response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal music. 2. Identified singing starting at 03:00. 3. Used OCR and context to identify song as 'Ningen no Uta' from 'Maoyu Maou Yuusha' (Original composer: Takeshi Hamata, Performer in video: Ninomae Ina'nis). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and their English translation for 'Ningen no Uta'. 5. Compiled the data into the requested JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis playing Minecraft and singing a song in Japanese while performing an in-game action at an anvil. The song is 'Ningen no Uta' from the anime 'Maoyu Maou Yuusha'.

scenes.description: Ninomae Ina'nis is in a Minecraft world, performing farming tasks and interacting with shop villagers. No vocal music is playing.
Ninomae Ina'nis is at an anvil in Minecraft, singing 'Ningen no Uta' while editing an item name.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Many lives disappearing quietly
I wasn't even myself
Desperately opening the heavy door
And seeing that the world was waiting for me
The freedom you gave me for the first time
No one can violate it
Because now I am a human
Because I am a human
I was wandering endlessly in the dark slumber
But now that I have the light
I can keep looking forward and walking
The joy of trying to become a better person
I won't discard that
Because now I am a human
Because I am a human
I want to live without shaming the people who couldn't live
The freedom you gave me for the first time
No one can violate it
Because now I am a human
Because I am a human
